ded_count":0,"listen_duration":0,"read_book_count":0,"read_duration":34827,"reply_count":2,"show_pv":20134},"user_action":{"author":0,"is_author_stick":false,"stick_position":0,"user_digg":false,"user_disagree":false}},"data_type":4},{"comment":{"comment_id":"7581319018814047038","common":{"comment_type":20,"content":{"image_data_list":{},"text":"顶，群像塑造的很不错，且主角爽的恰到好处，可以看出作者的认知程度较高，比较烦那种小学生矫情说教，这部则完全没有这种情况，刚开始看了个评论说是挑拨罗宾母女那段，给我吓到了，看完发现其实处理的很不错，与其说是玩弄的恶趣味，不如说是蔑视吧，把现实撕开袒露出来，也没有过多说教，主角更多的是不在乎，但对于主角收服的女人不会出现那种为难的情节，更多的是一种袒护，唯一可惜的就是，收了乙姬之后，人鱼公主岂不是收不了了，当女儿也太可惜了[哭]，更多的是想看新时间线的女角色，现在更多的是老角色年轻那会，我感觉是写不到那会了"},"content_type":0,"create_timestamp":1765166588,"group_id":"7461245587015355416","service_id":2,"status":1,"user_info":{"base_info":{"description":"","encode_user_id":"#c1967_MTk2NzE5NjcxOTY3MTk2N5RpzFJxAIGM9tSOHbEANqB6zEv3KAAndI83AuaUfUyI","gender":1,"is_cancelled":false,"profile_gender":1,"user_avatar":"http://p3-reading-sign.fqnovelpic.com/tos-cn-i-1yzifmftcy/674655df617242f98e7a09084e174978~tplv-s85hriknmn-jpeg-v1:144:0.jpeg?lk3s=9b9bd2b1&x-expires=1776700834&x-signature=Ds3JR8n4B%2Ftw0wIjlkBJKbOiI5E%3D","user_id":"2854792443462398","user_name":"我独自进厂"},"expand_extra":{},"user_id":"2854792443462398","user_relation":{"can_follow":true,"relation_type":1},"user_tag":{"fan_rank_num":0,"fan_ranklist_title":"","is_author":false,"is_blue_vip":false,"is_cp":false,"is_official_cert":false,"is_vip":false,"user_title_info":[]}}},"expand":{"book_id":"7461245587015355416","book_info":{"abstract":"一朝穿越天龙人，尽享海贼繁华事。
